description_long: This is a double-leaf wooden gate fence mounted between two robust, weathered concrete posts. The gate panels feature vertical slats with diagonal bracing, providing both structural support and a classic visual appeal. The posts are thick and show signs of wear, with black stains and a slightly rough texture, suggesting outdoor use and exposure to the elements. The base is a solid concrete slab, anchoring the entire structure and adding stability. Metal hinges and hardware are visible, painted black for contrast and durability. The overall design is utilitarian yet traditional, suitable for driveways, entrances, or property boundaries in urban or suburban settings.
description: A double-leaf wooden gate fence with vertical slats and diagonal bracing, set between two weathered concrete posts on a solid concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wooden gate panels, vertical slats, diagonal bracing, and the full width of the concrete base and posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the concrete post and base, with the gate panels seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view of the gate, showing the back of the wooden panels, hardware, and the concrete base and posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thickness of the post and base, with the gate panels edge-on.
